behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff between summary persistence and findings store for the same round. A pure unit test of one function can miss wrong repository/query wiring. Rejected System: behavior text does not require real OS/network/subprocess. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: verdict check is deterministic from stored FAIL/PASS records, not model quality or multi-agentic execution.
behaviors.test_description: Wire review-summary service + findings repository (local test DB or in-memory repo). Seed one round with at least one FAIL dimension finding, then attempt to store PASS summary; assert write is rejected and error references conflicting stored finding(s).
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Test requires cross-module read-before-write behavior, which is exactly Integration.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: Real failure appears when gate computation module and storage access are wired incorrectly (trusting summary text instead of stored findings). Unit-only logic tests may pass while integration still reads wrong source. Rejected System: no required real infra boundary in behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: this is deterministic data-source selection, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Set conflicting data for same round: summary text says all PASS, stored dimension findings include FAIL. Run stop-gate computation through service + repository stack; assert final verdict is FAIL (or non-PASS) and verify computation path used stored findings.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: The test validates cross-module data-source precedence, requiring Integration.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans validation + persistence/audit recording. Need module interaction to ensure both enforcement and warning-write happen together. Rejected System: auditable record can be verified in local DB/filesystem test doubles; no real external infra required by behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no LLM-dependent correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Exercise summary submission API/service in two cases: (1) manual override text without override flag -> reject; (2) with explicit override flag -> allow but assert warning/audit record is persisted with actor, round, and timestamp fields.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires service/repository interaction and side-effect recording beyond a single unit.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the review loop cannot finalize PASS unless a fresh review-agent round is executed on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Core failure is orchestration state validation (phase, diff revision, latest review round marker). This can be caught with deterministic stubbed review-round completion metadata. Rejected Agentic: behavior requires existence/freshness of a round, not quality/non-determinism of model output. Rejected Workflow: multi-step sequencing is present, but not multiple real agentic judgments; integration orchestration test is sufficient. Rejected System: no explicit real OS/network/subprocess dependency in behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Create scenario with prior failing round, apply Phase 4 fix producing new diff hash/revision, then attempt finalize PASS before running new review round -> must fail. Then record a new review round tied to updated diff and re-run finalize -> now eligible (subject to findings).
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: State-machine and storage wiring across modules are required; real LLM call is not.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings, the flow emits an escalation outcome instead of PASS.
behaviors.justification: Need interaction between round-counter policy and findings state across rounds. A single-function unit test may miss persistence/query and policy wiring errors. Rejected System: no required real external infra in behavior text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: decision is deterministic from stored MUST-FIX unresolved findings + round limits.
behaviors.test_description: Seed max-rounds-reached state with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in storage, execute finalization/orchestration step, and assert outcome is ESCALATION (not PASS), including emitted status/event payload.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Cross-module policy + persisted state check fits Integration minimum.
